Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: QuestNav
Description: QuestNav lists all your active quests and adds a Teleport button next to each one. Clicking it teleports you to the nearest unlocked aetheryte to the quest's location — no more hunting through the map.
Punchline: One-click teleport to the nearest aetheryte for each active quest.
Changelog:
v1.1.7: Major UI improvements � reduced row heights for compact display, quest info on single line with zone/cost details, smaller window (480x250), optimized spacing and buttons.
v1.1.6: Fixed arrow pointing wrong direction; event-driven quest refresh.
v1.1.5: UI redesign � sleeker 2-column layout, collapsible settings.
v1.1.4: Fixed quest lookup with improved error handling.
v1.1.3: Arrow background opacity slider.
v1.1.2: Fix arrow overlay never appearing.
v1.1.1: Fix crash on unknown quest IDs.
v1.1.0: Arrow overlay, teleport cost, zone highlight, map flag, compact mode, auto-refresh.
v1.0.0: Initial release.
